text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yawn... I got so carried away watching race videos and reading manga and stuff...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I think the sun was up by the time I went to
sleep... Now my eyelids are so heavy, I can't keep
them open...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wait, you mean I need to go to bed early?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Or do you mean... when it's late, I shouldn't
sleep?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaah! I dunno what's what anymore!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After staying up all night, Winning Ticket can't
even think straight.
